userStories.title: [#245] Add n_past guard in PrefixRestoreAsync to prevent cache nuking
userStories.description: After STATE_PUT restores KV cache with n_past=50000, if the next completion request has fewer tokens than cached n_past, llama.cpp silently erases the entire restored KV cache batch. Add a guard in WorkerSchedulerService.PrefixRestoreAsync that compares incoming prompt length against cached n_past and skips/clamps restore when user_tokens < cached_n_past * 0.85.
acceptanceCriteria: n_tokens > n_past check exists in PrefixRestoreAsync
When estimated tokens < cached_n_past * 0.85, restore is skipped or clamped
Log warning when guard triggers

userStories.title: [#246] Add unit tests for prefix-checkpoint save path (Stat→Put guard, first-writer-wins, metric)
userStories.description: The 4 tests added in PR #244 exercise only Router.ComputePrefixHash. Need to add tests with fake/mock StoreClient that assert the prefix-save branch in WorkerSchedulerService.SaveKvAsync: miss path (Stat returns non-Ok → Put issued), hit path (Stat returns Ok → no Put), disabled/null hash, and failure path (Store throws → exception swallowed).
acceptanceCriteria: Test: prefix-save miss path (Stat non-Ok → Put issued)
Test: prefix-save hit path (Stat Ok → no Put)
Test: disabled/null hash (no Store calls)
Test: failure path (Store throws → fire-and-forget swallows exception)

userStories.title: [#256/#255] Add /admin/reset endpoint for full Hydra.Core hard-reset (dev mode)
userStories.description: Add a POST /admin/reset endpoint that fully resets Hydra.Core internal state + erases all llama-server slots. Protected by HYDRA_DEV_MODE=true flag (default false, returns 404). Implementation follows exact steps in issue: cancel pipelines, fail pending timelines, recreate channels, release tracker slots, clear warm leases, clear session ledger, clear dictionaries, reset Prometheus gauges, erase llama slots.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /admin/reset returns 404 when HYDRA_DEV_MODE=false (default)
POST /admin/reset resets all state when HYDRA_DEV_MODE=true
All Prometheus gauges zeroed, counters unchanged
llama-server slots erased via LlamaClient.EraseSlotAsync
Unit tests for both enabled and disabled dev mode

userStories.title: [#201-Bug1] Fix broken checkpoint after STATE_PUT (hybrid model intersection collapse)
userStories.description: After STATE_PUT restores state, server-context.cpp creates a checkpoint using llama_memory_seq_pos_min/max which for hybrid models returns the INTERSECTION of attention and recurrent positions — collapsing to n_past-1 == n_past-1. This creates a partial-only checkpoint with NO attention KV data. Fix: after STATE_PUT, force create checkpoint using attention memory positions directly instead of hybrid intersection.
acceptanceCriteria: Checkpoint after STATE_PUT uses attention-only positions (0 to n_past-1)
No silent re-prefill on second turn after restore
Verified with 60K context test

userStories.title: [#201-Bug4] Fix state size TOCTOU race (retry loop)
userStories.description: server-context.cpp has a TOCTOU race: llama_state_get_size at line 2430 may return stale size when llama_state_get_data is called later. If another slot's processing changed state between the two calls, copied==0 triggers error. Fix: add retry loop (up to 3 attempts with short pauses) if copy fails.
acceptanceCriteria: Retry loop added on llama_state_get_data failure
Up to 3 attempts with short pauses
No silent failures on state save

userStories.title: [#201-Bug3] Replace blocking buffer with zero-copy socket streaming API
userStories.description: server-context.cpp line 2480-2482 uses llama_state_get_data with 800MB heap allocation. The true zero-copy API llama_state_seq_get_data_to_fd exists at llama-context.cpp:2899-2915 and streams tensor data directly to socket without intermediate buffering. Replace blocking buffer approach with socket-level streaming API.
acceptanceCriteria: 800MB heap allocation removed
Zero-copy streaming via llama_state_seq_get_data_to_fd
No performance regression on state save

userStories.title: [#252] Replace periodic /slots poll with event-driven verification + head→core webhook
userStories.description: Replace Hydra.Core's 20s periodic /slots poll with event-driven model. Phases: (A) head→core webhook via Signaller in hydra-head, (B) Coordinator refactor: deadline tracking, CheckInFlightDeadlinesAsync every 5s, switch VerifyWarmSlotAsync to STATE_META RPC, add /admin/llama_event handler, (C) config + workers.json with prefillspeed_tps, (D) comprehensive tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Steady-state: no health_poll_ok/log lines for 5+ minutes
slot_drift_detected fires within expected_ms*1.5 of stuck slot
On llama restart: llama_event_received within 1s, in-flight slots released
GET /health returns last_refresh_ts
Router.VerifyWarmSlotAsync uses STATE_META RPC not HTTP /slots
dotnet test src/core/Tests.Core/ — 100% pass
